title: Ben-Hadad #1130
definition:
Ben-hadad = "son of [the false god] Hadad"

 1) the king of Syria, contemporary with Asa of Judah
 2) the son of Hazael, also king of Syria
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ben-hadad = "son of [the false god] Hadad"

 1) the king of Syria, contemporary with Asa of Judah
 2) the son of Hazael, also king of Syria

    NASB:  son of Hadad, the name of several Aramean (Syrian) kings
